name: industrial-welding
description: Build tooling for the Industrial Welding WooCommerce theme.
author: Plasmargon Development Team

scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:rtl
scripts.package: dir-archiver --src . --dest ../industrial-welding.zip --exclude .DS_Store .codex .stylelintrc.json .eslintrc .git .gitattributes .github .gitignore 0_ README.md composer.json composer.lock node_modules vendor package-lock.json package.json phpcs.xml.dist style.css.map yarn.lock
